response.original_title: Maya Interview with a Sex Worker
response.overview: Never before released footage and interview with San Francisco stripper and xxx video starlet. Maya is a wild, willing and enthusiastic young lady captured in raw form by director Aleister Blue. During an interview, Maya aggressively movies the interview along to get down and dirty and shows off her sexy, petite, tattooed and pierced body with absolute confidence and charm. Maya was a fixture on the SF sex-scene in the early 2000s.
